title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Dedicated Freight Corridor - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Dedicated Freight Corridor - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Dedicated Freight Corridor invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Dedicated Freight Corridor:
Dedicated Freight Corridor is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dedicated Freight Corridor!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
